title: Tabby: a cat lives in your browser
description: Tabby keeps you company while you browse. Pet her, feed her, and watch her grow from kitten to adult. Private, local, and free.
ogImageAlt: Tabby, an orange cat companion for your browser tabs

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — Tabby
privacy.description: How Tabby handles your data. Local only, no accounts, no cloud. Active tab title and URL only.

terms.title: Terms of Service — Tabby
terms.description: Terms for using the Tabby Chrome extension. Free software from Yanovian LLC.
